meaning: n.[天]第谷(月球表面的一座环形山)
examples: This impact released an enormous amount of energy, excavating a crater about twice as large as the lunar crater Tycho.
However, the launch of Tycho Brahe will be Denmark's biggest.
I sit writing this from the hangar-sized Tycho Brahe plenary hall.
But they encouraged the Chinese to adopt the tools of Tycho Brahe and other famous astronomers in the West.
The lunar crater named after Tycho Brahe, a 16th century Danish astronomer, near the moon's south pole, is 85km across.
